patterns.description: Pydantic v2 requires Optional[X] fields to have explicit = None defaults. v1 auto-defaulted them.
@validator with 'values' parameter must become @model_validator(mode='before') in v2, since field_validator doesn't receive other fields' values.
Pydantic v2 doesn't auto-coerce int→str. Use model_config = ConfigDict(coerce_numbers_to_str=True) for models that receive numeric values in str fields.
In Pydantic v2, BaseSettings moved to pydantic-settings package. Install separately.
Many OSMO tests depend on Bazel-built 'services' or 'osmo' modules and cannot run outside Bazel.
test_workflow.py::ResourceSpecTest has pre-existing failures: convert_to_workflow_spec() never existed, test data is incompatible with schema.
np.bool was deprecated in NumPy 1.20+ and removed in 1.24+. Replace with builtin bool.
